cohorts.label: Hepatocellular carcinoma tumor tissue
cohorts.notes: Large adult HCC microarray cohort with explicit GEO tissue labels and a live accession-backed Illumina platform mapping path.

cohorts.label: Adjacent non-tumor liver tissue
cohorts.notes: Adjacent or paired non-tumorous tissue is not identical to healthy tissue.

open_questions: Cross-check the generated registry record against the benchmark-pack note: GEO series metadata exposes 240 liver tumor and 193 adjacent non-tumor liver samples on GPL10558, making this usable for an extended adult-HCC evidence slice even though it remains outside the stricter first-wave core.
